data.title: Kids Motorcycle - 3-Wheel Ride on Toy with Police Decals, Reverse, and Headlights - 6V Electric Motorcycle for Kids Ages 3 to

features: MOTORCYCLE FOR KIDS - Satisfy your child's need for imaginative play with this electric bike for kids. Perfect for indoors and outdoors
the toddler motorcycle works on any hard
flat surface and has a compact
REALISTIC FEATURES - The kid’s electric bike features engine sound effects
and police decals for extra fun. The toddler ride on has both forward and reverse functions
with a cruising speed of up to 1.75mph.
EASY TO RIDE - Recommended for kids aged 3 to 6
this 3-wheel kid’s electric motorcycle is easy to operate by simply switching it on and pressing the pedal to go. The ride on toy includes a 6-volt rechargeable battery for hours of smooth driving.
DURABLE AND SAFE - Made from high-quality plastic and carbon steel
the kid’s motorcycle ride on toy is built sturdy enough to support kids up to 55lbs. The motorcycle is free of phthalates
allowing your child to have fun in a safe and healthy way.
PRODUCT DETAILS - Materials: Plastic and Carbon Steel. Dimensions: (L) 31" x (W) 17" x (H) 21". Weight Capacity: 55lbs. Specs: 6V
Reverse Speed: 1.75mph. Some Assembly Required. For Ages 3 to 6. Color: Black and White.
